God's Grace

Our Heart

Development from Above for All-Round Transformation

Royal David City Development Foundation (RDCDF) was born out of a burning desire to salvage, uplift and empower the poor, the less privileged, and the vulnerable across Sierra Leone. Founded in 2010 after the rebel war, RDCDF steps in as a Civil Society NGO contributing to Health, Education, and Welfare through Advocacy, Capacity Building, and Community Empowerment.

"Raising and Empowering New Breed God-Fearing Leaders with sound health and mind for Nation and Kingdom Building."
RDCDF Mission Statement · Genesis 39:9, 41:47–49

Our Visionary Leadership

Rev. Dr. Lahai-Roi Lahai & Pst. Mrs. Christiana I. Lahai

Rev. Dr. Lahai-Roi Lahai serves as Head Pastor, President and CEO of Royal David City. Pst. Mrs. Christiana Isata Lahai serves as Resident Pastor and Deputy CEO — leading with faith, vision and compassion.

The RDCDF Family

Our Ministry Wings

⛪

Mount Zion Transformation Fellowship

Our Spirit-filled church in Hastings — Kingdom Advancement and the heartbeat of RDCDF.

🏫

Royal David Academy

Educational programmes at Levuma Mondu, Kailahun. Motto: "Study to Approve Yourself."

🎓

Royal Wisdom University

Proposed university on 12 acres in Kailahun — a landmark in higher education.

🏭

Royal Industrial Center

Tec-Voc Training & Empowerment for Youth and Women.

🏠

Royal Orphanage & Widow's Cottage

Welfare Ministries — caring for orphans, widows and the vulnerable.

🌍

Community Outreach

Health, advocacy and empowerment reaching communities nationwide.

Who We Are

About Royal David City & Mount Zion

A non-political, non-profit, Spirit-rooted organisation founded to transform Sierra Leone from the inside out.

The Organization

Royal David City — Our Foundation

RDCDF is the mother/umbrella Ministry — a non-political, non-profit Local NGO with a strong Christian background, fostering development in Education, Health & Sanitation, Advocacy, Spirituality, and Community Empowerment. Founded in 2010 after the rebel war in Sierra Leone.

Motto: "Development from above for all-round Transformation"

Our Three Pillars

01
Kingdom Advancement

Evangelism and the Gospel through Mount Zion Kingdom Advancement Outreach.

02
Education

Royal David Academy, Royal Wisdom University, literacy & scholarship programs.

03
Community Development

Industrial Center, Orphanage & Widow's Cottage, health and empowerment programs.

The Church

Mount Zion — Our Congregation

Mount Zion Transformation Fellowship is at N#25 Kingston Town, Hastings — a Spirit-filled congregation where lives are genuinely transformed by the Word of God.

"Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind."
Romans 12:2 — Our Anchor Scripture

What We Stand For

Our Core Values

✝️

Spirituality

Holiness & Righteousness in all we do.

🔄

Transformation

Building new life for the less-privileged.

❤️

Love & Care

Serving widows, orphans and the vulnerable.

🎓

Education

Accessible quality education for all.

🤝

Integrity

Transparency & accountability in all we do.

🌱

Development

Tangible community sustainability.

What We Do

Church Ministries & Programs

🙏

Sunday Worship Service

Spirit-filled praise, powerful preaching and communion every Sunday at N#25 Kingston Town, Hastings. All warmly welcomed.

📖

Midweek Bible Study

Every Wednesday evening — equipping believers with practical tools for everyday Christian living and spiritual growth.

👧

Children's Ministry

Bible teaching, drama and discipleship for children. Our 4th Annual Children's Thanksgiving showcases remarkable young talent.

👩

Women's Fellowship & Thanksgiving

A sisterhood of faith — mentorship, and our Annual Women's Thanksgiving in vibrant traditional attire.

🎶

Annual Praise Festival

Our multi-day Praise Festival & Crossing Over Service with ministers from across Sierra Leone, closing the year with praise.

🙌

Prayer & Intercession

Dedicated intercessors undergirding the church and nation — weekly prayer meetings and fasting schedules.

👨‍👧

Youth & Teens Ministry

Raising passionate young people aged 13–25, anchored in Christ and equipped for leadership.

🤝

Community Outreach

Street evangelism, hospital visits, food distributions and health initiatives across Freetown and Sierra Leone.

Kailahun District Initiative

Royal David Academy & Educational Complex

A landmark 12-acre development at Levuma Mondu, Mandu Chiefdom, Kailahun District. Actively seeking partners and donors.

12
Acres of Land
4
Facilities Planned
1,000+
Students to Benefit
2025
Groundbreaking Year

The Vision

Building a Centre of Excellence for Kailahun

RDCDF has secured 12 acres at Levuma Mondu, Mandu Chiefdom, Kailahun District. Following a successful Town Hall meeting with community leaders and a historic Groundbreaking Ceremony, this project is officially underway.

🏫

Royal David Academy

JSS and SSS providing quality secondary education in Kailahun. Motto: "Study to Approve Yourself."

🎓

Royal Wisdom University

Proposed University — offering higher education to Sierra Leoneans. Seeking academic partners.

🏭

Royal Industrial Center

Tec-Voc Training for Youth and Women — carpentry, tailoring, ICT, agriculture and more.

🏠

Royal Orphanage & Widow's Cottage

Dedicated shelter and care for orphans, widows and the most vulnerable in Kailahun.

Partner With Us — Be Part of History

We are seeking partners, donors and organisations who share our vision for accessible education. Together we can build something that will outlast us all.

What People Say

Testimonies of God's Faithfulness

Lives transformed by God's grace through Mount Zion Transformation Fellowship and Royal David City.

★★★★★
"Mount Zion is not just a church — it is a family. Since I joined this fellowship, my life has been completely transformed. The Word of God preached here is practical, powerful and life-changing. I am forever grateful to God for this ministry."
Sister Fatmata K.
Church Member, Hastings
★★★★★
"Rev. Dr. Lahai-Roi and Pst. Mrs. Christiana are true servants of God. Their commitment to the community of Kailahun and the whole of Sierra Leone is something I have never seen before. RDCDF is doing incredible work for our people."
Elder Joseph M.
Community Leader, Kailahun District
★★★★★
"The Children's Ministry here is outstanding. My children have grown spiritually and academically since we started attending Mount Zion. The Thanksgiving Services are something we look forward to every year as a family."
Sister Mariatu B.
Mother & Church Member, Western Area
★★★★★
"As a young person, the Youth Ministry at Mount Zion gave me a sense of purpose and direction. I was trained as a leader and given opportunities to serve. I am grateful for everything this ministry has done for my life."
Brother Emmanuel T.
Youth Member, Hastings
★★★★★
"I participated in the Annual Praise Festival in December 2024 as a minister of music. The Spirit of God was tangible throughout. The leadership of this church truly knows how to create an atmosphere of worship. I will be back!"
Min. Hannah
Guest Minister, 2nd Annual Praise Festival

We Are Standing With You

Submit a Prayer Request

"The prayer of a righteous person is powerful and effective." — James 5:16

"Cast all your anxiety on Him because He cares for you."
1 Peter 5:7

Whatever you are going through — sickness, family matters, finances, relationships, work, or any personal challenge — our prayer team at Mount Zion Transformation Fellowship is ready to stand in agreement with you before God. Submit your request below. All requests are treated with complete confidentiality.

Our prayer team will pray with you. God hears and answers prayer — be encouraged!

Who Leads Us

Our Leadership

Humble servants of God leading Royal David City and Mount Zion with integrity, vision, and love.

Rev. Dr. Lahai-Roi Lahai

Visionary · Head Pastor · President / CEO

Rev. Dr. Lahai-Roi Lahai is the Visionary, Founder and President/CEO of the entire Royal David City Commission. He serves as Head Pastor of Mount Zion Transformation Fellowship and oversees all wings — from Hastings to Kailahun.

Pst. Mrs. Christiana Isata Lahai

Co-Visionary · Resident Pastor · Deputy CEO

Pst. Mrs. Christiana Isata Lahai is the Co-Visionary, Resident Pastor and Deputy CEO — leading pastoral care, the women's ministry and church operations with grace and deep compassion.

📞 +23279075073 · +23276522331

Additional leadership profiles coming soon.
